name: scientific-research
description: Plan, collect, deduplicate, and synthesize scientific literature from public scholarly sources with provenance and quality gates.

interface.longDescription: Scientific Research gives Codex a disciplined workflow for scholarly discovery, source routing, deduplication, open-copy handling, claim ledgers, and evidence quality gates across arXiv, OpenAlex, Crossref, Europe PMC, Semantic Scholar, NCBI, CORE, and OpenCitations.
defaultPrompt: Research recent papers on this topic.
